info.title: CurseForge API
info.description: The CurseForge API provides access to game mods, addons, files, and related resources. It supports searching, retrieving mod details, file management, fingerprint matching, and Minecraft-specific endpoints.

get.description: Retrieve all games accessible via the API key.
Fetch a single game by its ID.
Get available versions for a game (V1).
Get available versions for a game with enhanced data (V2).
List version types for a game.
Retrieve categories, filtered by game or class ID.
Search mods with multiple filter options.

parameters.name: searchFilter
parameters.description: Free text search filter for mod names and authors.

get.description: Get a single mod by its ID.

post.description: Retrieve multiple mods by ID list.
Get featured, popular, and recently updated mods.

get.description: Fetch the full mod description in HTML.
Get a specific file for a mod.
List all files for a mod.
Access the changelog for a specific mod file.
Obtain the download URL for a specific mod file.

post.description: Retrieve multiple files by file ID list.
Match fingerprints to find exact and partial file matches.

get.description: Get details for a specific Minecraft version.
Get details for a specific Minecraft mod loader.

apiKey.name: x-api-key
apiKey.description: API key generated in the CurseForge for Studios developer console.
